post.description: Create a new user account with email and password

get.description: Retrieve user profile information by user ID

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot access another user's profile

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot update another user's profile

delete.description: Soft delete a user account (sets deletedAt timestamp)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot delete another user's account

get.description: Get all categories for the authenticated user, ordered by (parentId nulls first, name). Includes transactionCount. The `children` field is always an empty array on this endpoint — the list is flat by design. Does not filter by isActive.

post.description: Create a new category. parentId is optional — omit for a top-level category. Nesting is limited to one level.

400.description: Validation error or depth limit exceeded

get.description: Get a specific category. Returns 404 if not found or belongs to another user.

patch.description: Partially update a category. Supports renaming, changing colour/icon, reparenting, or toggling isActive.

400.description: Validation error or depth limit exceeded

delete.description: Delete a category. Hard-deletes if no transactions are linked; soft-deletes (isActive=false) if transactions exist. Returns 400 if the category has child categories.

200.description: Category soft-deleted (has transactions) — isActive set to false

post.description: Create a new user account and receive a JWT token
Authenticate with email and password to receive a JWT token

get.description: Returns whether initial setup is required (no users exist)

post.description: Creates the first admin user during initial setup

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Create a new transaction for the authenticated user. originalDate is set from date and cannot be changed.

get.description: Get paginated list of transactions for the authenticated user. Defaults to active transactions only.

post.summary: Get AI-suggested category for a transaction
Auto-categorize all uncategorized transactions using AI

get.description: Get income, expense, and net totals for a date range. Only active transactions are included. Transfers are excluded from totals.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter by account UUIDs (repeat for multiple)

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by category UUIDs (repeat for multiple)

parameters.name: transactionType
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (repeat for multiple)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by description text (partial match, min 1 char)

400.description: Invalid date format or filter value

get.description: Convenience endpoint to get income, expense, and net totals for a full calendar month (1-based).
Get a specific transaction. Returns 404 if not found or belongs to another user.

patch.description: Partially update a transaction. transactionType cannot be changed. originalDate is never modified.

delete.description: Permanently delete a transaction. This action is irreversible.

patch.description: Flip the isActive flag on a transaction. Inactive transactions are excluded from totals.

post.description: Creates a rule that maps a description pattern to a category. Set applyToExisting=true to immediately back-fill uncategorized transactions.

get.description: Get all accounts for the authenticated user, ordered by name. Each account includes computed currentBalance and transactionCount.

post.description: Create a new account. currency defaults to "CAD", openingBalance defaults to 0, isActive defaults to true.

get.description: Get a specific account. Returns 404 if not found or belongs to another user.

patch.description: Partially update an account. Supports renaming, changing type, toggling isActive, updating openingBalance, etc.

400.description: Invalid UUID format or body validation error

delete.description: Delete an account. Hard-deletes (204) if no transactions are linked; soft-deletes (200, isActive=false) if transactions exist. Transactions retain their accountId reference after soft-delete.

200.description: Account soft-deleted (has transactions) — isActive set to false

post.description: Upload a CSV file to import transactions. File size limit: 5 MB. Returns the created ImportJob with parse results.

400.description: Missing file, unsupported type, or file too large

404.description: Account not found or belongs to another user

get.description: Get all import jobs for the authenticated user, newest first.
Get a specific import job. Returns 404 if not found or belongs to another user.
Get all sync schedules for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new automated sync schedule for a bank account. Credentials are encrypted at rest.

400.description: Invalid bankId, accountId, or cron expression

409.description: A sync schedule for this account already exists

patch.description: Update cron, credentials, or enabled state. Re-encrypts credentials if password provided.

delete.description: Removes the cron job and hard-deletes the record. Does not affect synced transactions.

post.description: Start an immediate sync for the given schedule. Returns a sessionId to subscribe to the SSE stream.

get.description: Subscribe to real-time status events for a running sync job. The :id is the sessionId returned by POST /:scheduleId/run-now.

404.description: Session not found, not owned by user, or server restarted mid-sync (mfa_required / running state cannot be resumed — start a new sync run).

post.description: Submit the MFA code to a sync worker waiting for user input. Returns 400 if no MFA challenge is pending.

400.description: No pending MFA challenge for this session

404.description: Session not found or not owned by user

post.description: Terminates the waiting sync worker, marks the job as failed, and emits a failed SSE event. Safe to call even if the session has already ended (idempotent).

404.description: Session not found or not owned by user

get.description: Returns metadata for all registered bank scrapers. Used by the frontend to populate the bank picker. No authentication required.

post.description: Re-scans SCRAPER_PLUGIN_DIR and registers any valid .js plugins found. Existing registrations with the same bankId are overwritten. Requires ADMIN role. No request body required.

403.description: Caller is not an ADMIN user

post.description: Upload a .js plugin file. It is written to SCRAPER_PLUGIN_DIR and loadPlugins() is called so the new plugin is immediately available. The default export must satisfy the BankScraper interface. Requires ADMIN role. Only .js files up to 10 MB are accepted.

file.description: A .js file whose default export satisfies BankScraper

400.description: Invalid file type, unsafe filename, or SCRAPER_PLUGIN_DIR not configured

403.description: Caller is not an ADMIN user

post.description: Opens a Playwright browser, calls plugin.login() with the provided inputs, then calls plugin.scrapeTransactions() for the specified lookback period. Returns the raw RawTransaction[] with no database write. Requires ADMIN role. Returns 404 if bankId is not registered.

parameters.name: bankId
parameters.description: Unique bank identifier registered in ScraperRegistry (e.g. cibc, td)

403.description: Caller is not an ADMIN user

404.description: No scraper registered for the given bankId

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to current month.

get.summary: Get dashboard summary (net worth, income, expenses, savings rate)

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to current month.

get.summary: Get spending breakdown by category for a given month
Get AI categorization availability and configuration
List all API tokens for the current user

info.title: Finance Tracker API
info.description: RESTful API for personal finance tracking application

notifyEmail.description: Receive email notifications for MFA alerts

parentId.description: Parent category ID (UUID), null for top-level categories

transactionCount.description: Number of transactions linked to this category (active and inactive)

parentId.description: Parent category ID (UUID). Omit for a top-level category.
Parent category ID (UUID). Set to null to make top-level.

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticating subsequent requests

transferDirection.description: Required for transfer transactions: whether money is arriving in this account or leaving it

fitid.description: Optional deduplication key. If a transaction with this fitid already exists for the user, the existing transaction is returned silently instead of creating a duplicate. Useful for AI-driven imports.

isPending.description: Whether the transaction is still pending/unsettled

transferDirection.description: Transfer direction (in/out). Only set for transfer transactions.

status.description: Whether the transaction was newly created or already existed

total.description: Total uncategorized transactions found before the 200-record cap

processed.description: Number of transactions actually fetched and processed (capped at 200)

transferDirection.description: Transfer direction (required when transactionType is transfer, send null when changing away from transfer)

categoryId.description: Category UUID assigned when pattern matches

pattern.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against transaction descriptions

categoryId.description: Category UUID to assign when the pattern matches

applyToExisting.description: If true, immediately apply this rule to existing uncategorized transactions

openingBalance.description: Opening balance at the time the account was added

currentBalance.description: Current balance (openingBalance + all active income − all active expense transactions)

openingBalance.description: Opening balance at the time the account was added (positive or negative)

color.description: Hex colour code for UI display (e.g. #4CAF50)

isActive.description: Whether the account is active (default: true)

accountId.description: Account UUID to sync transactions into

bankId.description: Bank identifier (must match a registered BankScraper.bankId)

inputs.description: Plugin-specific input fields — keys and expected values are defined dynamically by the selected bank's inputSchema

cron.description: Cron expression for the sync schedule (e.g. '0 8 * * *')

lookbackDays.description: Days to look back for overlapping transactions (default: 3)

autoCategorizeLlm.description: Automatically categorize imported transactions using LLM (default: false)

inputs.description: Plugin-specific input fields — keys and expected values are defined dynamically by the selected bank's inputSchema

cron.description: Cron expression for the sync schedule (e.g. '0 8 * * *')

lookbackDays.description: Days to look back for overlapping transactions (default: 3)

autoCategorizeLlm.description: Automatically categorize imported transactions using LLM (default: false)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the sync schedule

startDate.description: Override the computed start date for this sync window. ISO 8601 UTC string (e.g. "2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"). If omitted the service uses the standard lookback calculation.

dryRun.description: When true, runs the full scrape pipeline (login, scrape, dedup check) but skips the final database write. All SSE status events are emitted normally; the terminal complete event will have importedCount: 0. Defaults to false when omitted.

code.description: The one-time code entered by the user to satisfy the MFA challenge.

key.description: Field key used in the inputs map

hint.description: Optional hint text displayed below the field

requiresMfaOnEveryRun.description: Whether an MFA challenge is required on every scraper run

maxLookbackDays.description: Maximum number of days in the past the scraper can retrieve

pendingTransactionsIncluded.description: Whether the scraper returns pending (un-posted) transactions

inputSchema.description: Fields the plugin requires from the user

message.description: Human-readable summary of the reload operation
Human-readable summary of the install operation
message.example: Plugin cibc installed and loaded successfully

bankId.description: bankId from the plugin's default export

pluginDir.description: Absolute path of the directory written to SCRAPER_PLUGIN_DIR

inputs.description: Key-value map of inputs passed directly to plugin.login(). Keys and values are plugin-specific (e.g. username, password, card number).

lookbackDays.description: Number of calendar days back from today to scrape. Defaults to the plugin's maxLookbackDays when omitted. Must be a positive integer.

bankId.description: The bankId that was tested — echoes the :bankId path parameter

transactions.description: Raw transaction rows returned by the scraper. No deduplication or DB write is performed.

count.description: Number of transactions returned — convenience field equal to transactions.length

endpoint.description: Push service endpoint URL to remove

date.description: Transaction date as ISO 8601 UTC string

transactionCount.description: Count of non-transfer transactions in the period

categoryId.description: Category ID; null for uncategorised transactions

total.description: Total amount spent in this category

expiresAt.description: Expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be tomorrow or later. Omit for no expiry.

lastUsedAt.description: Last time this token was used

expiresAt.description: Token expiry timestamp, null = never expires

token.description: Raw token value — returned ONCE only at creation time

lastUsedAt.description: Last time this token was used

expiresAt.description: Token expiry timestamp, null = never expires
